name: Chicken Breast with Sage & Nutmeg
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red Bell Pepper, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any fat from the chicken.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, finely chopped sage, grated nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
3. Dredge each chicken breast in the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off any excess.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook for 6 to 7 minutes on each side, or until browned.
6. Add vermouth and bell pepper strips to the skillet. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
7. Transfer the cooked chicken to a platter. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and garnish with fresh sage sprigs.
( Fat: 6.7, Cholesterol: 72.)
